title: The Forest Path
description: The path your grandmother called the first mile of every adventure. Sun through the canopy, moss on old stones — and just off the track, the wayshrine: a knee-high heap of offerings left by travelers over more centuries than anyone has counted.

skills.text: Sit a while on the mossy stone
resultText: You sit. The forest carries on around you — unhurried, million-year-old business. Your shoulders come down from around your ears.
The moss has exactly remembered the shape of you. You suspect this stone has been a bench longer than your family has been curators.
